summary: A highly praised 1981 show with solid listening experience despite no specific recording details.
review: The reviewer rates the performance a perfect five stars, calling it a very good show and expressing love for hearing it. While there are no technical comments about the source or mix, the enthusiasm suggests the recording is at least listenable and captures the energy of one of the fan's favorite years.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 5‑star review, all positive about the show; no recording specifics, so rating leans on strong musical praise but with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard, audience mix, or clarity; reviewer’s enjoyment implies acceptable audio quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer highlights overall enjoyment of the concert without noting any weak moments.
